title: Legends: Power Rangers
description: The Power Rangers pack for Legends Mod 1.18.2 & 1.20.1 Forge Minecraft.
body:
![Legends Power Rangers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51c27091252d5b943f6174c5501a319d80bd93b3.png)

Ever wanted to build your own Morpher while flying around in the Pterodactyl Zord battling Megazords in Minecraft?! Or traverse across Angel Grove as Green Mighty Morphin Ranger hunting down the Power Rangers? The Legends Power Rangers Pack will feature Power Rangers Series such as Mighty Morphin, S.P.D., Dino Thunder, In Space, Time Force, RPM, and way more, allowing you to suit up as your Rangers or become evil villains such as Lord Drakkon to fight in the battle against good evil.

![Morph Sequence](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMXFwNm50bWJ4YmQ4ODVmZTk4ZWNpYTV3cDhoZGdoczdyeTF2bWQycSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/96hl5BvwcDJvr0ul1J/giphy.gif)
